name: 25 MG Atenolol Tablets IP
about: 25 MG Atenolol Tablets IP is a type of general medicine manufactured in India. It is a solid dosage form that comes in the form of tablets. The medicine contains 25 mg of Atenolol, which is used to treat high blood pressure and chest pain. It works by blocking the action of certain natural chemicals in the body, such as adrenaline, on the heart and blood vessels. This helps to lower blood pressure, heart rate, and the workload on the heart. The tablets should be stored in a dry place to maintain their effectiveness. It is recommended to take the medicine as prescribed by your doctor. Do not exceed the recommended dose or take it for longer than prescribed. It is important to continue taking the medicine even if you feel well, as high blood pressure often has no symptoms.
